inputs.text: Meri tabiyat bahut kharab hai, bukhar hai, sir dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash appearance, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding can be seen in other viral infections but are more characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria's symptoms do not typically include rash and bleeding gums

inputs.text: Ab toh bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, recovery hai ya fir hemorrhagic signs dikhai de rahe hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged weakness and potential hemorrhagic signs are consistent with Dengue's recovery or complication phase

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific symptoms of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of characteristic Malaria symptoms
